name: Raspberry Cheesecake (Low-fat)
recipeIngredient: 32 ounce carton of plain nonfat yogurt
1 1/2 cups fat free cookies, ground into fine crumbs
1/4 cup + 1/4 cup fruit juice sweetened raspberry preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Moisten fingers with water and press cookie crumbs over bottom of 8-inch springform pan. Chill while preparing remaining ingredients.
3. Beat together yogurt cheese, honey, vanilla, and arrowroot until smooth.
4. Beat egg whites to soft peaks. Gradually fold in the cheese mixture, beating until well combined.
5. Pour half of the filling into the prepared pan. Spread 1/4 cup of jam on top. Pour remaining filling on top. Using a knife, cut through the cheesecake to form swirls. Smooth the top with a spatula.
6. Bake at 325°F for 50 minutes, or until the center is set and the surface is lightly browned. Remove from oven and cool to room temperature.
7. Spread remaining jam over the top of the cheesecake, refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
Of course, other jams can replace the raspberry flavor. It's also good to put fresh fruit on top instead of the jam.
Nutritional information:
Calories: 213
Fat: 0.2 gram
% of calories from fat: 1%
Cholesterol: 2 milligrams
Sodium: 151 milligrams
Dietary Fiber: 2 grams
This recipe makes 8 servings.
